name: pinme
description: Zero-config frontend deployment tool that publishes static sites as verifiable content via IPFS/decentralized storage with a single command. Supports Claude Code Skills natively. Handles Vite/React/Vue/Next.js builds, CAR file import/export, custom domain binding, and GitHub Actions integration.

findings_summary.notes: Well-structured individual org repo (glitternetwork) written in TypeScript. MIT license. Actively maintained with last push Feb 16 2026. Has LICENSE, CHANGELOG.md, .env.example, and a properly integrated Claude Code skill under .claude/skills/pinme/. Good documentation including SKILL.md, table of contents, error handling guide, and upload limits documentation. Prettierrc code style enforced. 208 forks and only 2 open issues indicating good maintenance. Missing SECURITY.md. Deployment target is IPFS/decentralized storage (pinit.eth.limo domain) which introduces a novel trust model: content is content-addressed and tamper-evident, but relies on third-party IPFS pinning infrastructure. VIP membership required for custom domain binding. No malicious patterns detected. Users should note dependency on glitternetwork's IPFS pinning service availability.
